answer: 311 response times have fluctuated over the last six months, with the number of service requests peaking in April 2026 at 24,465 and dropping significantly to 9,275 in May 2026. Other notable counts include 23,614 in March 2026 and 20,375 in January 2026. This suggests a recent decline in service requests, which could impact response times.
